summary: M2 PostgreSQL evidence-lake schema migration delivered. Adds 8 tables (pipeline_runs, source_runs, harvested_pages, evidence_seeds, evidence_cards, anchor_passages, proposal_ledger, vector_ingestion_records), 22 indexes (run/source/family/text_hash), and one rollup view. Each high-volume table has idempotent key, text/hash index, and JSONB raw payload column. Migration is additive only; observed_mentions / alias_map_entries / triage_label_decisions untouched. Dry-run runner and 3-mode rollback plan included.

artifacts.description: Additive evidence-lake schema. 8 tables + 22 indexes + 1 view, all using CREATE ... IF NOT EXISTS, all referencing pipeline_runs(run_id) with ON DELETE cascade or SET NULL as appropriate.
Three rollback modes (TRUNCATE, DROP TABLE, DROP SCHEMA CASCADE), all wrapped in transactions ending with ROLLBACK so the file is safe to execute as-is; operator promotes to COMMIT after review.
Dry-run / apply runner. Default --dry-run prints plan summary (counts, table list, index list, view list). --apply requires SANGUO_RAG_PG_DSN. Rollback SQL is never auto-executed.

acceptanceMapping.criterion: each high-volume table has idempotent key + text/hash key + run/source index + JSONB raw payload
acceptanceMapping.evidence: evidence_seeds.seed_id PK + seed_text_hash idx + (run_id, source_id) idx + payload jsonb; same pattern for evidence_cards (evidence_id PK + quote_hash idx + general_ids GIN), harvested_pages (uq (run_id, url_hash, text_hash) + text_hash idx + raw_payload), anchor_passages (uq (corpus, layer, locator, text_hash) + text_hash idx + raw_payload), vector_ingestion_records (uq (provider, namespace, record_id, record_sha256) + payload), proposal_ledger (signature idx + payload).

acceptanceMapping.criterion: migration does not modify JSONL output and does not force PostgreSQL at runtime
acceptanceMapping.evidence: additive-only DDL; no app/* code changes; runner default is --dry-run; --apply gated on env DSN.
apply_postgres_evidence_lake_schema.py supports --dry-run; postgres_evidence_lake_rollback.sql provides TRUNCATE / DROP TABLE / DROP SCHEMA CASCADE modes wrapped in ROLLBACK by default.

nextActions: SANGUO-RAGOPS-0202: repository adapter uses this schema for upsert in postgres / dual modes
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0203: backfill JSONL evidence into these tables
SANGUO-RAGOPS-0204: parity gate diffs JSONL manifests against these tables
